extraction.one_line_summary: BAIS Davide won from early 4-man breakaway at Gran Sasso after peloton conceded stage completely, no GC action.
tactical_patterns: Team DSM surrendered maglia rosa defense effort after ensuring PETILLI couldn't threaten LIKENESS's time gap, prioritizing rest over bonus seconds.
GC contenders tacitly agreed to neutralize Gran Sasso MTF despite 2000m altitude, suggesting collective fatigue at 219km dictated race dynamics.

rider_signals.YATES Simon: neutral: referenced only as 2018 winner of identical finish, no participation data
rider_signals.MILAN Jonathan: negative: lost further points to HURLESTON in intermediate sprint maglia ciclamino battle
rider_signals.EVENEPOEL Remco: neutral: finished in gruppo with no time gaps, minimal effort shown
